phrases.text_local: Onde posso pedir num terraço de café aqui na rua?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo pih-DEER NOONNG teh-RAH-soo DIH kuh-FEH uh-KEE NUH ROOUH?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao garçom no terraço do café mais próximo.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW guh-ruh-SOHNG NOO teh-RAH-soo DOO kuh-FEH MEYESH PRAW-see-moo.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the waiter at the nearest cafe terrace.

responses.english: Ask the waiter at the nearest cafe terrace.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW guh-ruh-SOHNG NOO teh-RAH-soo DOO kuh-FEH MEYESH PRAW-see-moo.
responses.french: Pergunte ao garçom no terraço do café mais próximo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where traditional azulejo facades are
phrases.text_local: Onde ficam as fachadas de azulejos tradicionais?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuhng UHSH fuh-SHAH-duhsh DIH uh-zoo-LEH-zhoosh truh-dee-seeoo-NEYESH?
phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese streets often feature historic tilework on specific building facades.

likely_response.local: Encontre fachadas de azulejos no Arco da Vila.
likely_response.pronunciation: ayng-KOHNGT-rih fuh-SHAH-duhsh DIH uh-zoo-LEH-zhoosh NOO AH-ruh-koo DUH VEE-luh.
likely_response.translation_en: Find azulejo facades at Arco da Vila.

responses.english: Find azulejo facades at Arco da Vila.
responses.phonetic: ayng-KOHNGT-rih fuh-SHAH-duhsh DIH uh-zoo-LEH-zhoosh NOO AH-ruh-koo DUH VEE-luh.
responses.french: Encontre fachadas de azulejos no Arco da Vila.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a entrada do Arco da Vila?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH ayngt-RAH-duh DOO AH-ruh-koo DUH VEE-luh?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Arco da Vila.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW AH-ruh-koo DUH VEE-luh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Arco da Vila.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Arco da Vila.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW AH-ruh-koo DUH VEE-luh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Arco da Vila.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Arco da Vila entrance is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a entrada do Arco da Vila?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH ayngt-RAH-duh DOO AH-ruh-koo DUH VEE-luh?
phrases.cultural_note: The Arco da Vila is the historic gateway to Faro's Old Town, marking the start of the pedestrian route.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, siga as placas para o Arco da Vila.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW AH-ruh-koo DUH VEE-luh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, follow the signs to the Arco da Vila.

responses.english: Good morning, follow the signs to the Arco da Vila.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW AH-ruh-koo DUH VEE-luh.
responses.french: Bom dia, siga as placas para o Arco da Vila.

phrases.intent_en: Where do I order at cafe terraces?
phrases.text_local: Onde é que se faz o pedido nos terraços?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih EH KIH SIH FAHSH AW peh-DEE-doo NOOSH teh-RAH-soosh?
phrases.cultural_note: In Portuguese cafes, ordering is typically done at the counter, not at the table.

likely_response.translation_en: Ask the waiter on the terrace.

responses.english: Ask the waiter on the terrace.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar a saída para a Sé?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AH SUHEE-duh PUH-ruh AH SEH?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Sé.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SEH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Sé.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Sé.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SEH.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Sé.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a saída para a Sé?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH SUHEE-duh PUH-ruh AH SEH?
phrases.cultural_note: Largo da Sé is the square by the cathedral, a common exit point from Rua de Santo António.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Sé Cathedral view is
phrases.text_local: Onde se avista a Catedral da Sé?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH uh-VEESH-tuh AH kuh-tihd-RAHL DUH SEH?
phrases.cultural_note: Cathedral views in Faro are best accessed from elevated historic squares.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Sé, desde o Arco da Vila.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SEH, DEHZH-dih AW AH-ruh-koo DUH VEE-luh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Sé, from the Arco da Vila.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Sé, from the Arco da Vila.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SEH, DEHZH-dih AW AH-ruh-koo DUH VEE-luh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Sé, desde o Arco da Vila.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, onde é a saída da Sé?
phrases.pronunciation: skoo-ZEE, OHNG-dih EH AH SUHEE-duh DUH SEH?
phrases.cultural_note: The Sé Cathedral is a prominent landmark in Faro, and Largo da Sé is the square at its exit, often paved with calçada portuguesa.

likely_response.local: A saída da Sé é no Largo da Sé.
likely_response.pronunciation: AH SUHEE-duh DUH SEH EH NOO LAH-ruh-goo DUH SEH.
likely_response.translation_en: The cathedral exit is at Largo da Sé.

responses.english: The cathedral exit is at Largo da Sé.
responses.phonetic: AH SUHEE-duh DUH SEH EH NOO LAH-ruh-goo DUH SEH.
responses.french: A saída da Sé é no Largo da Sé.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Largo da Sé exit is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a saída para o Largo da Sé?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH SUHEE-duh PUH-ruh AW LAH-ruh-goo DUH SEH?
phrases.cultural_note: Exits in historic Portuguese alleys often lead directly to major squares or cathedrals.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Largo da Sé.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW LAH-ruh-goo DUH SEH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to Largo da Sé.

responses.english: Follow the signs to Largo da Sé.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW LAH-ruh-goo DUH SEH.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Largo da Sé.
